title: simple trade cycling
description: cycle trades from villagers and get the best enchanting books!
body:
🔄 Features

  ✅ How to Use

  Shift-Right-Click any villager → GUI opens → Click emerald button → Trades reroll!

  ✅ Alternative Method

  Type /rerollvillager near a villager

  🖱️ GUI Display

  ╔═════════════════════════╗
  ║ Villager Trade Reroller ║
  ║                         ║
  ║       [EMERALD]         ║
  ║    §a§lReroll Trades    ║
  ║                         ║
  ║  Click to reset trades! ║
  ║   Cost: 0 emeralds      ║
  ╚═════════════════════════╝

  ⚡ Features

  ✅ Shift-right-click activation
  ✅ Clean GUI interface
  ✅ Configurable emerald cost
  ✅ Cooldown system
  ✅ Can reroll locked villagers
  ✅ Nearby villager detection
  ✅ Permission-based
